label: Batch Search File Contents
description: Run multiple content searches in one call.

function.name: batch_grep_search
function.description: Run multiple content searches across vault markdown files in a single call. Each query searches independently. Use this when you need to search for several different text patterns at once instead of calling grep_search repeatedly.

queries.description: A JSON array of query objects. Each object must have a "query" field and optionally a "file_pattern" field. Example: [{"query": "TODO", "file_pattern": "projects/"}, {"query": "meeting agenda"}]
